(Scale 1–5: 1 = Never heard of it → 5 = I work with / study it)

Do you think tokenisation, AI, and regulation reinforce each other or work independently?
(Scale 1–5: 1 = Completely independent → 5 = Strongly reinforce each other)

column12: Compared to 3–5 years ago, do you think blockchain's credibility in finance has improved, stayed the same, or declined?
